examples: The rhombic dodecahedron packs together to fill space.
The dodecahedron gave the tunnel enough of a circular shape in section.
The galaxy in question would really be behind you, but you're looking through one face of the dodecahedron as if it were a window.
Dr Luminet's calculations suggest that this weakness can be explained if the universe is finite and dodecahedron-shaped.
For Jean-Pierre Luminet, of the Paris Observatory, and his colleagues believe that the universe is, indeed, a dodecahedron.
